SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-29-2019 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-29-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-29-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II (D514). PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY SOFIA REYES LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT BIANCA LUIZA CORREA IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LUIZA CORREA, BIANCA $1,019.72 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,119.72 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
